description.value:
Frequency once per day

Trigger Your turn begins, and you are commanding a troop

Effect You encourage your followers to persevere against all hardships. The troop you command gains temporary Hit Points equal to twice your level which last for 1 minutes. If your troop's size would be reduced due to damage, you can attempt a @Check[flat|dc:16]; on a success, your troop's size isn't reduced at that threshold until the end of your next turn.
